description: CommentEnricher — has_doc (function preceded by a doc comment) + comment_style, on forgeql-pub.frozen (node_id.rs).

cases.name: has_doc_true
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE name='sha256_of_path' WHERE has_doc='true' LIMIT 5

cases.name: has_doc_false
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE name='parse_offset' WHERE has_doc='false' LIMIT 5

cases.name: doc_line_comments
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE fql_kind='comment' WHERE comment_style='doc_line' LIMIT 100

cases.name: inner_doc_comments
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE fql_kind='comment' WHERE comment_style='inner_doc' LIMIT 100

cases.name: line_comments
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE fql_kind='comment' WHERE comment_style='line' LIMIT 100

cases.name: negative_no_doc_block
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE fql_kind='comment' WHERE comment_style='doc_block' LIMIT 100
